concept.label: Concept
concept.description: An abstract idea, theory, method or definition.

technology.label: Technology
technology.description: A tool, system, framework or technique.

term.label: Term
term.description: A glossary term or piece of terminology.

process.label: Process
process.description: A procedure, workflow or sequence of steps.

other.label: Other
other.description: Anything that does not fit the other types.
